title: Power Wheelchair Billing Dispute — Acceptable Handling
scenario: Customer disputes an invoice. Agent gives correct info but does not proactively resolve.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Hi, I got an invoice for six hundred dollars that I don't think is right.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: That's showing as coinsurance after Medicare paid their portion. Your supplemental might cover it if you have one.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I do have one — why wasn't it billed?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'd have to submit that separately. I can put in a request to our billing team to refile it.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Usually a couple weeks. You'll get an updated statement.
